name: Chunky Granola
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Oil (reduce from original recipe; can try even less)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Stir until thoroughly coated. Press mixture firmly into two well-greased baking sheets (9x13" pans).
Bake for 10-15 minutes, or until nicely browned. Cut immediately into 24 bars. Remove from pans when cool.
